[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000010 1
1 000000000 a
2 000000100 1
3 000100001 2
4 000001100 2
5 010000101 3
6 010010100 3
7 100000100 2

01 10 000000000 a match 1

23 32 010001100 3

70 07 100000100 2 match 7
